page_content:
Formerly: HLTH688R.

HLTH653 Quantitative Research Methods II in Public Health (3 Credits) Intermediate and advanced statistics and procedures in health-related research for doctoral students with the focus on applications of these statistical methodological methods to public health research. Prerequisite: HLTH652.

Restriction: Must be in a major within SPHL-Behavioral & Community Health department.

Credit Only Granted for. HLTH653 or HLTH688T.
